message:
wa-upg.10.6: typed client integration tests + clippy fixes

Adds 51 integration tests validating robot_types against JSON schemas:
deserialization roundtrips for all 26 response types, schema field
compatibility checks for aligned endpoints, drift detection freezing
12 known schema↔type mismatches, error envelope tests, and tolerant
deserialization tests. Also fixes clippy warnings across prior commits
(float_cmp, case_sensitive_file_extension, manual_string_new,
duration_suboptimal_units, needless_collect).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -911,7 +911,7 @@ mod tests {
         let ep = EndpointMeta {
             id: "state".into(),
             title: "Pane State".into(),
-            description: "".into(),
+            description: String::new(),
             robot_command: Some("robot state".into()),
             mcp_tool: Some("wa.state".into()),
             schema_file: "wa-robot-state.json".into(),
@@ -926,7 +926,7 @@ mod tests {
         let ep = EndpointMeta {
             id: "workflow_run".into(),
             title: "Run Workflow".into(),
-            description: "".into(),
+            description: String::new(),
             robot_command: Some("robot workflow run".into()),
             mcp_tool: Some("wa.workflow_run".into()),
             schema_file: "wa-robot-workflow-run.json".into(),
@@ -941,7 +941,7 @@ mod tests {
         let ep = EndpointMeta {
             id: "unknown_new_thing".into(),
             title: "New Thing".into(),
-            description: "".into(),
+            description: String::new(),
             robot_command: None,
             mcp_tool: None,
             schema_file: "wa-robot-new.json".into(),
@@ -1070,7 +1070,7 @@ mod tests {
             name: "x".into(),
             type_str: "integer".into(),
             required: true,
-            description: "".into(),
+            description: String::new(),
             enum_values: vec![],
             minimum: None,
             maximum: None,
@@ -1085,7 +1085,7 @@ mod tests {
             name: "x".into(),
             type_str: "string".into(),
             required: true,
-            description: "".into(),
+            description: String::new(),
             enum_values: vec!["a".into(), "b".into()],
             minimum: None,
             maximum: None,
